from: Chairs Howard Safir, Robert J. Strang and Giorgio Kolaj
subject: D.A.R.E. Benefit - Dec 1st - Metropolitan Club - Reserve Now!
body:
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

D.A.R.E. America
Chairs Howard Safir, Robert J. Strang, Giorgio Kolaj
Invite You to Join Us for a Benefit Reception
(Tickets Info: 212-244-7333)
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

HONOREE:
Mark S. Gold, MD
Chairman, RiverMend Health, Scientific Advisory Boards
Distinguished Professor, Eminent Scholar, UFAA Distinguished Alumni Professor;
Donald R. Dizney Professor and Chairman, University of Florida College of Medicine
(1990-2014)
Professor (Adjunct), The Keck School of Medicine at USC and
Washington University School of Medicine, St. Louis Missouri
HONOREE HALL OF FAME: Peter Arnell, Susan M. Baer, Wayne Bennett, Bridget G. Brennan,
John and Margo Catsimatidis, Michael Coan, Lyor Cohen, Steven Fisher, Hon. Rudolph
W. Guiliani, Tom Harrison, Tommy Hilfiger, Alfred R. Kahn, Ken Kaess
(deceased), Herbert Kleber, MD, The Kolaj Family, Michele M. Leonhart, The Livanos
Family, Thomas D. Mottola, Chazz and Gianna Palmenteri, Richard D. Parsons, Dan 
Rather, Eric Schneiderman, NYS AG, Arthur Surin, Karen P. Tandy, Anne Kallin Zehren
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

BENEFIT RECEPTION
Speakers
William J. Bratton
Police Commissioner, NYPD
And
Rikki Klieman
Legal Analyst, CBS News Corp.
Hosted by
John and Margo Catsimatidis
Honoring
Mark S. Gold, MD
For his groundbreaking work in basic and clinical addiction research and training
the next generation of researchers and clinicians in Addiction Medicine
Tuesday, December 1, 2015
6:00 to 8:00 PM
The Metropolitan Club
1 E. 60th St. New York, NY
(Jacket & Tie required)
Benefit Committee
Jeff Bauml         James J. Hunt
Dr. Ann Beeder     Giorgio Kolaj
John Castle        Dalia and Larry
John and Margo    Leeds
Catsimatidis       John Miller
Michael Coan      Frank Pergueros
Rita Cosby         Lewis Rice
Bruce Doniger      Howard Safir
James Essey        Robert J. Strang
FOR TICKET-PACKAGE INFORMATION
and toPAY BY CREDIT CARD
D.A.R.E. America Benefit c/o Special Events Unlimited, Inc., 212-244-7333 or
specialevents@specialeventsunlimited.com
www.dare.org
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
